content:
HERO_HEADLINE: The torque wrench that catches calibration errors first
SUBHEADLINE: For MRO engineers and aerospace assembly technicians who cannot afford post-installation failures
BENEFIT_1: Real-Time Drift Detection | Alerts before the fastener is applied — not after inspection finds the error
BENEFIT_2: Independently Verified Accuracy | ±0.5% across the full torque range, certified under ISO 6789-2:2017
BENEFIT_3: Shift-Ready Durability | IP68 rated, ATEX certified, ergonomic grip designed for 8-hour use
CTA_PRIMARY: Request a site demo
CTA_SECONDARY: Download spec sheet
